zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Howlett於1477年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯時，他的父親William de Howlett39歲，母親Katherine Wingfield11歲。他於1505年與Agnes Deynes在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年5月在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Howlett于1477年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯时，他的父亲William de Howlett39岁，母亲Katherine Wingfield11岁。他于1505年与Agnes Deynes在英国英格兰諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年5月在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Howlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hu(gh)elot, a double diminutive of Hugh, Hue (see Hugh ) formed with the suffixes -el + -ot. This Anglo-Norman name has also been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 13th century, where it has been Gaelicized as Húiléid.

variants.name: Hewlett
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Howlett  . This surname is also established in Ireland (mainly Tipperary).

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Howlett was born in 1477, in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Howlett, was 39 and his mother, Katherine Wingfield, was 11. He married Agnes Deynes in 1505, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in May 1548, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Howlett est né en 1477, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Howlett, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Katherine Wingfield, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Deynes en 1505, à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Little Wenham, Suffolk, England: Little Wenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Howlett 1477 in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Howlett 39 und seine Mutter Katherine Wingfield 11. Er hat 1505 in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes Deynes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1548 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Howlett è nato il nel 1477 nel Bures, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Howlett, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Wingfield, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Deynes nel 1505, nel Wymondham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Howlettが1477年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレスで生まれた時，父William de Howlettは39歳，母Katherine Wingfieldは11歳であった。1505年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムでAgnes Deynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年5月に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Howlett(이)가 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Howlett(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Wingfield(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 Agnes Deynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 5월 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Deynes em 1505, em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Howlett родился в 1477 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Howlett было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Wingfield, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Deynes в 1505 г. в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер май 1548 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Agnes Deynes en 1505, en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1548, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
